title: 12pk A3 Mailing Bag, Peel & Seal Delivery Bags for Parcels, Documents & Clothes, 29.7 x 42cm Strong Tear Resistant Plastic Vinted Shipping Bags for Packaging, Postage, Office, Home & Business Use
features: STRONG & TEAR-RESISTANT MATERIAL - These A3 mailing bags are made from 0.12mm polyethylene that resists tears & punctures, offering protection for clothes, documents & parcels. Ideal as mailer bags, postage envelopes & postal bags

SECURE PEEL & SEAL CLOSURE - Features a self-adhesive peel & seal strip for a secure, tamper-resistant closure without tape. Great for mailing bags for clothes, plastic bags for packaging, packing bags for posting, and postage envelopes
LIGHTWEIGHT MATERIAL - Weighing just 11g, these bags help minimize postage costs while still offering strength and protection, making them ideal for eCommerce sellers and personal use
WEATHER-RESISTANT DESIGN - Protects contents from moisture, dirt, and dust during transit, providing peace of mind when shipping items such as clothes, catalogues, and non-fragile goods
VERSATILE FOR CLOTHING AND GENERAL SHIPPING NEEDS - Perfect for shipping clothes, documents, books, and more. A practical solution for home sellers, small businesses, and online marketplaces

The A3 mailing bags measure 29.7 x 42 cm, perfect for sending documents, books, catalogues, and clothing. They are great for parcels that need protection during delivery without folding or damage. Are these mailing bags suitable for packaging clothes? Yes, these mailing bags are ideal for packaging clothes, providing a strong, tear-resistant solution for posting garments. They are popular for shipping clothes, clothing packaging bags, and plastic delivery bags for clothes. Do the mailing bags have a reliable seal for postage? The peel and seal closure provides a secure, tamper-resistant seal. This makes packing faster and helps keep your items protected during postage, whether you’re sending documents, clothes, or parcels. Can these bags protect contents from dust and moisture? Yes, the bags are made from 0.12mm tear-resistant plastic that helps shield contents from dust, dirt, and moisture during transit, giving peace of mind when posting items like clothes or documents. Are these bags suitable for home and business use? These A3 mailing bags are practical for both home and business use. They are ideal for posting parcels, clothes, and documents securely. Perfect for small businesses, online sellers, and everyday postage tasks.
